Python API Reference

This page provides the automatically generated documentation for the Gentoo-Builder Python modules.

Orchestrator

exception core.orchestrator.BuildOrchestratorError[source]

Bases: Exception

class core.orchestrator.BuildOrchestrator(arch='x86_64', config_path='configs/global_build.json', mode='mock', clean=True, init_system='openrc', desktop=None, kernel=None, bootloader=None, package_profiles=None, service_profiles=None, live_profile=None, output_name=None, force_isolated_toolchain=False, target='livecd-stage2')[source]

Bases: object

Parameters:

  • arch (str)

  • config_path (str)

  • mode (str)

  • clean (bool)

  • init_system (str | None)

  • desktop (str | None)

  • kernel (str | None)

  • bootloader (str | None)

  • package_profiles (List[str] | None)

  • service_profiles (List[str] | None)

  • live_profile (str | None)

  • output_name (str | None)

  • force_isolated_toolchain (bool)

  • target (str)

mount_virtual_fs()[source]
umount_virtual_fs()[source]
run_in_chroot(command, env=None)[source]

Executes commands inside chroot with real-time log streaming to console.

Parameters:

  • command (List[str] | str)

  • env (dict | None)

Return type:

CompletedProcess

Chroot Setup

class core.chroot_setup.ChrootSetup(target_root, mode='mock', default_profile=None)[source]

Bases: object

Parameters:

  • target_root (Path)

  • mode (str)

  • default_profile (str | None)

prepare_resolv_conf()[source]

Copy host’s /etc/resolv.conf into chroot for network connectivity.

prepare_default_profile_symlink()[source]

Ensure /etc/portage/make.profile points to a valid profile if missing.

Portage Manager

exception core.portage_manager.PortageManagerError[source]

Bases: Exception

class core.portage_manager.PortageManager(chroot, config)[source]

Bases: object

Parameters:

  • chroot (ChrootManager)

  • config (Dict[str, Any])

configure_make_conf()[source]
sync_portage()[source]
update_world()[source]

Update Gentoo world set non-interactively (–ask=n).

setup_custom_overlay(custom_ebuilds_dir=None)[source]

Inject custom overlay and ebuilds into Portage chroot tree.

Parameters:

custom_ebuilds_dir (Path)

install_packages(packages)[source]
Parameters:

packages (List[str])

System Customizer

Bases: object

Parameters:

  • config (Dict[str, Any])

setup_live_users()[source]
setup_services()[source]
copy_custom_files()[source]

Copies structured files from configs/custom_files/ into the chroot as specified in configs.

configure_system_defaults()[source]
